_comment: Copy to benefactor.json (next to the disks) to tune. Env vars override these.
_comment0: Modern controls (X = interact/pickup, X+Down = drop, Hop as its own action, FIRE no longer interacts). OFF by default = authentic Amiga scheme (FIRE does pickup/interact/drop-with-Down, Up = jump). interact_extend and the interact/hop/drop bindings below only take effect when this is true.
_comment1: Extra HORIZONTAL reach (px) for pickup + interaction, on top of vanilla (vertical unchanged). Applies in BOTH schemes (vanilla extends Fire's reach; modern moves it to X). 0 = exact original reach. Try 15 if pickups feel too fiddly.
_comment4: Key bindings. Each value is a comma-separated list of CHORDS; a chord is keys joined by '+'. Names: Up/Down/Left/Right, Space, Return, LShift/RShift, LCtrl/Ctrl/RCtrl, Tab, single letters/digits. Omit any line to keep the default shown.
